title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Medlife Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Medlife Advisory Limited family as a Backend Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
